title: apochloa subtiramulosa
intro: Apochloa subtiramulosa, also known as Apochloa, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Apochloa subtiramulosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Apochloa subtiramulosa is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical application, showcasing its versatility in traditional herbal medicine.
